license_contract: All listed assets MUST be CC0 (Creative Commons Zero Public Domain Dedication). Mixing any other license into this directory is a compliance violation.
notes: No suitable CC0 3D human eyeball models were found during P2c.6 research (Sketchfab/Poly Haven/BlenderKit CC0 filter returned only cultural artefacts, crabs, and flowers). The Blender render pipeline falls back to procedural eye geometry. Add CC0 eye assets here when they surface.
